What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a red bandana and white chef's coat stands in a kitchen with wood cabinets and hanging pots. Hands hold raw pinkish-white shrimp above a clear glass bowl resting on a white cutting board. The person uses both hands to peel the shell off the shrimp. Text reading 'Our Cookbook' appears in the top right corner.
